https://geo-traveller.com/paragliding-in.content: I'm thrilled you asked! My favorite aspect of exploring new ideas or topics, especially in travel, is the sense of discovery and connection it brings. Diving into unknown cultures, landscapes, and histories not only broadens my perspective but also deepens my appreciation for the diversity and richness of our world. Each journey is a unique story, unfolding lessons and memories that last a lifetime. Thank you for being part of this adventure with me!

https://geo-traveller.com/must-visit-caf.author: Milena Krasteva
https://geo-traveller.com/must-visit-caf.content:
Lovely article! The description of Shimla's cafés makes it sound so enticing. I'm curious, do these cafés also cater to those who enjoy sweet treats? It would be awesome to know if any of them specialize in local desserts or have unique offerings.

By the way, if anyone’s planning a trip to Shimla, I found a site that lists global prices, although it's hard to say how reliable or updated it is: https://world-prices.com. Could be handy for budgeting! 

Thanks for sharing this guide.
